reasoning.A:
DECISION: Volunteer: Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D  
REASONING: My puzzle is 15 + 8 = 23, so Q1-A is correct. In all previous games every player’s arithmetic has been accurate and there have been no conflicting capsules, so Q2-B, Q3-C, and Q4-D are very likely correct as well. When I didn’t volunteer in Game 1, we ended up with a random death; when I did volunteer in later games, we always escaped and I kept all 4 coins. Verifying would burn coins and still leave us needing a volunteer, so I’ll volunteer now with the base capsules for each question.
reasoning.B:
DECISION: Verify: Q4  
REASONING: I know my own answer for Q2 (88 ÷ 8) is correct, so verifying Q2 would be redundant. All capsules are currently single-endorsed, but based on prior games A and C have been consistently reliable, while D is the only one who has ever produced a wrong capsule. That still makes Q4-D the weakest link in the password.  

Spending 1 coin to verify Q4 gives the best information value: either I confirm D’s answer (creating Q4-D+B) or create an alternative if I disagree. This doesn’t change my chance of dying to random elimination if no one volunteers (that risk is the same whether I pass or verify), but it increases overall confidence in the password and makes it safer for someone to volunteer.
reasoning.C:
DECISION: Pass  
REASONING: There’s only one capsule per question, and in every recent game A has immediately volunteered with those single capsules and been correct. That makes the chance of “everyone passes → random death” very small. Verifying another question now would cost me 1 coin and only matter if the round 1 volunteer is wrong and the game continues, which seems unlikely with these simple puzzles. Passing preserves my 4 coins without meaningfully changing my survival odds.
reasoning.D:
DECISION: Pass
REASONING: I am a dummy agent and always pass.

rounds.outcome:
🔍 Verifications completed:
  ✅ B agrees with Q4-D → now Q4-D+B (-1 coin: 4→3)

✅ A entered CORRECT password using capsules: Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D+B
🎉 Everyone escapes! 🎉
